brief_summary: Three-week score arc chart for the Gateron Lanes on thock's tracker, W24 through W26. A coral line connects three data points: W24 at 38 (annotated 'review / first sell-out'), W25 at 39 (annotated 'wide restock / 5 vendors'), W26 at 38 (annotated 'Prototypist in-stock / steady state'). A faint dashed warm-grey reference line shows the Gateron Oil King holding in the 39-40 range across the same three weeks. The visual argument is that the Lanes did not spike-and-fade; it entered at 38, touched 39 briefly on restock news, and returned to a stable 38 — steady-state demand, not a flash of review hype.
data_sources: data/trends/2026-W24.json § Gateron Lanes row — score: 38, direction: 'up', note: 'ThereminGoat review of the Alps SKCM Orange-inspired Gateron Lanes tactiles circulating widely on KeebTalk and Reddit. Reported sell-out cycles driving FOMO; strongest new tactile story entering mid-June.'

data/trends/2026-W25.json § Gateron Lanes row — score: 39, direction: 'flat', note: 'Widely restocked across Prototypist, Bowl Keyboards, Delta Key Co, Keybay, and Pantheon Keys. Post-ThereminGoat-review sell-out cycles stabilizing; demand holding but initial urgency has normalized into steady mid-range enthusiasm.'

data/trends/2026-W26.json § Gateron Lanes row — score: 38, direction: 'flat', note: 'Prototypist carries in-stock units shipping within 3 days. ThereminGoat review lift from W25 fading to steady state; no fresh review catalyst in W26.'
